changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.sql: WITH doc_cat AS ( SELECT id FROM category WHERE entity_name = 'document' ), -- SubCategory: Kommunikation sc_comm AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category WHERE name = 'Kommunikation' AND category_id = (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category (id, name, translation_key, category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Kommunikation', 'jaynaApp.document.main.communication', (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category WHERE name = 'Kommunikation' AND category_id = (SELECT id FROM doc_cat) ) RETURNING id ) i ), -- Gruppen unter Kommunikation scg_corr AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Alltagskorrespondenz' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Alltagskorrespondenz', 'jaynaApp.document.group.everyday-correspondence', (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Alltagskorrespondenz' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) ) RETURNING id ) i ), scg_protocols AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Protokolle' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Protokolle', 'jaynaApp.document.group.protocols', (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Protokolle' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) ) RETURNING id ) i ), scg_digital AS ( SELECT id FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Digitale Kommunikation' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) UNION ALL SELECT id FROM ( INSERT INTO sub_category_group (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_id) SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Digitale Kommunikation', 'jaynaApp.document.group.digital-communication', (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sub_category_group WHERE name = 'Digitale Kommunikation' AND sub_category_id = (SELECT id FROM sc_comm) ) RETURNING id ) i ) INSERT INTO group_type (id, name, translation_key, sub_category_group_id) -- Alltagskorrespondenz SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Allgemeine Korrespondenz', 'jaynaApp.document.type.general-correspondence', (SELECT id FROM scg_corr) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Allgemeine Korrespondenz' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_corr)) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Grußkarte', 'jaynaApp.document.type.greeting-card', (SELECT id FROM scg_corr) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Grußkarte' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_corr)) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Einladung', 'jaynaApp.document.type.invitation', (SELECT id FROM scg_corr) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Einladung' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_corr)) -- Protokolle UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Besprechungsprotokoll', 'jaynaApp.document.type.meeting-minutes', (SELECT id FROM scg_protocols) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Besprechungsprotokoll' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_protocols)) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Vereinsprotokoll', 'jaynaApp.document.type.club-minutes', (SELECT id FROM scg_protocols) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Vereinsprotokoll' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_protocols)) -- Digitale Kommunikation UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'E-Mail Ausdruck', 'jaynaApp.document.type.email-printout', (SELECT id FROM scg_digital) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'E-Mail Ausdruck' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_digital)) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Social-Media-Post', 'jaynaApp.document.type.social-media-post', (SELECT id FROM scg_digital) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Social-Media-Post' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_digital)) UNION ALL SELECT nextval('sequence_generator'), 'Chat-Verlauf', 'jaynaApp.document.type.chat-log', (SELECT id FROM scg_digital) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM group_type WHERE name = 'Chat-Verlauf' AND sub_category_group_id = (SELECT id FROM scg_digital));

changeSet.author: assistant
